arts.sum: Barcelona great Lionel Messi has sent the club a special message as part of the Catalans’ 125th anniversary celebrations. It is a great pride for me to be part of this club and to be a fan of Barcelona,” he said.

arts.ttl: Every Golden Boy winner as Lamine Yamal takes 2024 prize
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has been named as winner of the Golden Boy award in 2024, handed to the best footballer playing in Europe aged 21 or under. Yamal’s recognition continues a stunning year for the Barcelona teenager, who broke into the senior side last season in a record-breaking campaign.
